response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video and identified song title '薔薇獄乙女' and credits (Lyrics: 宝野アリカ, Music: 片倉三起也) from on-screen text at 02:15.
2. Performed a web search for '"薔薇獄乙女" Ali Project Japanese and English lyrics' to find the official song details and lyrics.
3. Confirmed 'ALI PROJECT' as the original artist and verified the performer in the video as the virtual character Cece.
4. Segregated the video into an intro dialogue segment and a performance segment based on audio cues.
5. Formatted findings into the requested JSON schema.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual character performing a cover of "薔薇獄乙女" (Baragoku Otome) by ALI PROJECT on a stylized, clockwork-themed stage. The performance is preceded by a dialogue segment.

scenes.description: The video begins with the virtual character, Cece, talking on a clockwork-themed stage with lava in the background. A small character companion is present. This is a dialogue/introductory segment.
Cece begins singing the song "薔薇獄乙女". The background stage shifts to a green/nature-themed version of the clockwork stage. On-screen credits for the song appear at 02:15.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
豹のように美しくわたし
着飾るは闇の毛皮
谷間の百合 踏みつけても
あなたの場所に向かうため

生きたいのか 堕ちたいのか
もうわからないけれど
これが愛で 苦しみならば
終焉がほしいですね

ああ 奪い取って その心
牢に変わりゆく わたしの
体の奥 閉じ込めるわ

豹のように美しくわたし
着飾るは闇の毛皮
谷間の百合 踏みつけても
あなたの場所に向かうため
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Beautiful as a leopard, I am
Adorned in a fur of darkness
Even if I trample on the lilies of the valley
It is to reach your place

Do you want to live? Do you want to fall?
I don't know anymore, but
If this is love and if this is pain
I want an end, don't I?

Ah, steal away that heart
And into the jail, I change
I will lock you away
Deep within my body

Beautiful as a leopard, I am
Adorned in a fur of darkness
Even if I trample on the lilies of the valley
It is to reach your place
